rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies real generality issues (general Hopf-hom and tensor-product-functoriality lemmas buried as `private` in the wrong file, redundant `rfl` simp lemmas) all verifiable in the diff. Review 2's central finding misreads the code — `BaseChange.map_comp` and `map_id` already derive their results via `exact Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map_comp/map_id`, not re-prove them — so acting on Review 2 would delete valid API lemmas and worsen the PR.
